## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss communication preferences and strategies for Alice to effectively support Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/Yyi1wacKajtgM15owsu73gK3E5-XrJKX?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel provided insights into his communication style, priorities, and context needed for Alice to draft emails/messages on his behalf](https://fathom.video/share/Yyi1wacKajtgM15owsu73gK3E5-XrJKX?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)
  - [They discussed categorizing contacts (clients, partners, friends, etc.) and how to prioritize/handle communication](https://fathom.video/share/Yyi1wacKajtgM15owsu73gK3E5-XrJKX?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Marcel shared resources like his personality profile to help Alice understand his working style better](https://fathom.video/share/Yyi1wacKajtgM15owsu73gK3E5-XrJKX?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [They aligned on scheduling preferences - protecting Marcel's morning focus time while accommodating important meetings](https://fathom.video/share/Yyi1wacKajtgM15owsu73gK3E5-XrJKX?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)

## Topics

### Communication Style and Preferences

  - [Marcel prefers a more informal, conversational tone for communication, avoiding overly formal language](https://fathom.video/share/Yyi1wacKajtgM15owsu73gK3E5-XrJKX?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Context is key - understanding backstory/relationship with each contact to tailor messaging](https://fathom.video/share/Yyi1wacKajtgM15owsu73gK3E5-XrJKX?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [For new contacts, start more formal until rapport is built; for existing contacts, be more casual](https://fathom.video/share/Yyi1wacKajtgM15owsu73gK3E5-XrJKX?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Prioritize being concise but insightful in written communication](https://fathom.video/share/Yyi1wacKajtgM15owsu73gK3E5-XrJKX?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Contact Categorization and Prioritization

  - [Clients: Top priority, don't reschedule meetings unless absolutely needed](https://fathom.video/share/Yyi1wacKajtgM15owsu73gK3E5-XrJKX?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)
  - [Partners (AirOps, Hypergrowth): High priority, strong relationships](https://fathom.video/share/Yyi1wacKajtgM15owsu73gK3E5-XrJKX?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
  - [Friends/Referrers: Informal tone, flexible meeting times](https://fathom.video/share/Yyi1wacKajtgM15owsu73gK3E5-XrJKX?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Executives (DeepGram): Very important, try not to reschedule](https://fathom.video/share/Yyi1wacKajtgM15owsu73gK3E5-XrJKX?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)
  - [Use ATO to track context/notes on key contacts](https://fathom.video/share/Yyi1wacKajtgM15owsu73gK3E5-XrJKX?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Understanding Marcel's Working Style

  - [Marcel shared personality profile insights (decisive, quick to act, expressive)](https://fathom.video/share/Yyi1wacKajtgM15owsu73gK3E5-XrJKX?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
  - [He is an ENFP personality type - this provides helpful context](https://fathom.video/share/Yyi1wacKajtgM15owsu73gK3E5-XrJKX?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Prefers minimal meetings in mornings to have focus/deep work time](https://fathom.video/share/Yyi1wacKajtgM15owsu73gK3E5-XrJKX?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Dislikes 30 min meeting blocks as it's unproductive time](https://fathom.video/share/Yyi1wacKajtgM15owsu73gK3E5-XrJKX?tab=summary&timestamp=1589.0)

### Scheduling Strategies

  - [Protect mornings (esp Mon/Tues) for Marcel's gym/focus time before 9am](https://fathom.video/share/Yyi1wacKajtgM15owsu73gK3E5-XrJKX?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)
  - [But make exceptions for critical meetings that must be scheduled early](https://fathom.video/share/Yyi1wacKajtgM15owsu73gK3E5-XrJKX?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Plan ahead to block off stretches of mornings meeting-free when possible](https://fathom.video/share/Yyi1wacKajtgM15owsu73gK3E5-XrJKX?tab=summary&timestamp=1534.0)
  - [For team 1:1s and internal meetings, more flexibility to reschedule](https://fathom.video/share/Yyi1wacKajtgM15owsu73gK3E5-XrJKX?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Alice to review shared resources (personality profile, ENFP traits)](https://fathom.video/share/Yyi1wacKajtgM15owsu73gK3E5-XrJKX?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Continue discussing examples to build templates for different contact types](https://fathom.video/share/Yyi1wacKajtgM15owsu73gK3E5-XrJKX?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Prioritize understanding context for key contacts from ATO notes](https://fathom.video/share/Yyi1wacKajtgM15owsu73gK3E5-XrJKX?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up session to review scheduling strategies](https://fathom.video/share/Yyi1wacKajtgM15owsu73gK3E5-XrJKX?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)
